sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113137" key="xalko/liqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκό-λῐθος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n113137.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">copper ore, copper,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> </bibl>Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.54B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.54B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
